summary: Cavallo argues horse owners can cut hoof-care costs during COVID-19 by keeping horses barefoot at home and using Cavallo hoof boots only for riding.
Student researcher Gabriella Lynn, who led a Western Kentucky University study on Cavallo Trek hoof boots, earns a full scholarship to the Royal Veterinary College.
Educational piece on contracted heels in horses: how to recognize the deformity, its causes, and its links to laminitis, coffin bone rotation and navicular disease.
Announces Cavallo's continuing sponsorship of PATH International (Professional Association of Therapeutic Horsemanship), supporting therapy horses and volunteers.
Customer testimonial about Pilot, a rescue horse with severe White Line Disease who recovered with farrier care and Cavallo hoof boots.
Customer story on Benny, a horse with a fractured P2 pastern bone and supporting-limb laminitis, who stays comfortable in Cavallo Trek Slim Sole hoof boots.
Cavallo founder Carole recaps her guest appearance on Carly Kade's equestrian podcast, discussing rethinking horseshoes and the evolution of Cavallo hoof boots.
Announces that Yvonne Welz, longtime publisher of The Horse's Hoof magazine, has joined Cavallo's customer service team to help horse owners with boot fit and the barefoot movement.
Announces Megan Hensley, 'The Donkey Farrier,' joining the Cavallo team to advise donkey and mule owners on hoof care and fitting Cavallo boots.
Profiles hoof-care expert Dr. Brian Hampson and his Brumby Safari/BushMob treks, where Cavallo Trek boots protect brumbies over rough desert terrain.
Advises showing barefoot horses, such as AMHA miniature horses, by using Cavallo CLB boots to protect soles on rocky showgrounds and during practice.
Announces a Cavallo affiliate program awarding US Pony Club members who earn H-HM/H/H-A Horse Management Certification a free pair of Trek hoof boots.
